title: butyrospermum paradoxum subsp. niloticum
intro: Butyrospermum paradoxum subsp. niloticum, also known as the African shea tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapotaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include soothing and moisturizing the skin, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant's nut is typically used to prepare shea butter, a popular herbal remedy that can be found in various forms, including creams, lotions, and soaps.
